reasoning: The target rating is 1% higher than 2453, meaning she needs a FIDE rating of at least 2477.53 (effectively 2478) on the Wikipedia page by the resolution dates. She proved capable of this level when she reached 2477 in August 2025. However, she had a rough September (Grand Swiss) dropping her back to 2453 for October. Searches reveal that in late October 2025, she competed at the European Chess Club Cup, losing in round 4 to Divya Deshmukh and yielding her points. As a result, she is definitively shedding points in October, ensuring her published November rating will end up below 2453. Since FIDE's official updates occur monthly, her rating displayed on Wikipedia for both November 2 and November 25 will be her lower November rating (or a lagging October rating of 2453). Neither satisfies the 2478 condition, making a YES practically impossible for the first two dates. For January 24th, 2026, she will have two full months (November and December) to bounce back. Given she successfully jumped 27 points in a single month earlier this year, a return to her August peak forms a plausible upper tail scenario, placing the probability near 18%.
